title: 有馬記念の後に・白星

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: My, my. To think this would happen.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Heh. No matter. Our paths have only just
converged.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: You won this battle, but the next will be mine.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! I'll show you who will win our second
battle!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, what a mess this has become. First you
entered the Japan Cup, and now even C.B. has
run in the Arima...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
After all the care and thought I put into advising
you, too. You can lead an Umamusume to water,
but you can't make her drink, I suppose.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, but it was so much fun! What's the harm in
having some fun, hm?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Come on, stop looking so severe. Cheer up
and get swept up in the festivities around you!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You can't hide it from me... You were excited
during the race, weren't you?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O... You never cease to surprise
us.

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
...I hope to see more miracles from those
unyielding legs of yours.
